summary: completed staff-level auth hardening review with fixes across callback/login/signout, identities UI, e2e bootstrap, and env/docs wiring
how_to_test: cd apps/web && npx vitest run --project unit src/lib/auth/callback.test.ts src/lib/auth/messages.test.ts src/lib/auth/redirects.test.ts src/lib/auth/identities.test.ts src/app/auth/callback/route.test.ts src/app/auth/signout/route.test.ts src/lib/supabase/middleware.test.ts src/lib/panes/paneRouteRegistry.test.tsx && npx vitest run --project browser src/__tests__/components/SettingsPage.test.tsx "src/app/(authenticated)/settings/identities/page.test.tsx" "src/app/login/LoginPageClient.test.tsx" && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && cd ../e2e && CI=1 WEB_PORT=3001 API_PORT=8001 npx playwright test tests/auth.spec.ts --config=playwright.config.ts
risks: non-local callback traffic fails closed when AUTH_ALLOWED_REDIRECT_ORIGINS is missing by design
e2e auth bootstrap depends on Supabase session-cookie encoding format; upstream format changes will require harness updates
optional live GitHub provider callback round-trip remains credential-gated and may be skipped without E2E_GITHUB_* env vars
